Title: Relates to health and social services practitioners included under the health care proxy law, the family health care decisions act, and nonhospital orders not to resuscitate
Summary: Adds licensed mental health counselors and licensed marriage and family therapists to the health and social services practitioners included under the health care proxy law, the family health care decisions act, and nonhospital orders not to resuscitate.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to making minor amendments to the health and social services practitioners included under the health care proxy law, the family health care decisions act, and nonhospital orders not to resuscitate
